CreateL2Policy.action: Fixed value for this API: CreateL2Policy
CreateL2Policy.instanceId: Short ID of the PFS instance for which the rule is created
CreateL2Policy.policyName: Name of the rule. Supports letters, digits, Chinese characters, colons (:), underscores (_), and hyphens (-). Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Length: 1–128 characters.
CreateL2Policy.path: Path associated with the rule. Must start with "/" and must not end with "/"
CreateL2Policy.expiredTime: Expiration time of the rule in days, range: 1–1825
CreateL2Policy.type: Rule type: 0 for data deletion; 1 for data archiving
CreateL2Policy.executeTime: Execution hour of the rule, integer from 0 to 23, default is 0
CreateL2Policy.bucketName: Target bucket for data archiving. Required when type is data archiving.
CreateL2Policy.bucketPrefix: Target prefix for data archiving. Required when type is data archiving. Must not start with "/" and must end with "/"
